name: loan_validation_rules
description: Validation rules applied by validate_loan_application against a canonical loan application.

requested_amount.description: Loan amount must be between $25K and $5M.

requested_term_months.description: Term must be a standard amortization length.

industry_naics.description: NAICS code must be exactly 6 digits.

financials.description: Exactly three years of complete, non-null statements; balance sheet must balance within tolerance.

collateral.description: If collateral is present, appraised_value must be positive.
